name: quick actions include macro option for non-micro tempo

source.purpose: When tempo recommendation is non-micro or the scene is exhausted, quick-action repair should preserve close options while ensuring at least one pacing/transition choice.

narrator.prose: The same file stack keeps pointing back to the same clerk.

inputActions: Ask the clerk one more direct question.
Press the stamp mark for a clue.
outputActionsInclude: Spend time following the known lead until the situation changes.
